title: The Emily Arc
html:
The Emily Arc — the long-distance Eugene-to-Austin relationship Yahir is documenting from late 2025 through at least April 2026. Spans intimate wishlists, visit-itineraries, schoolwork-help, and a values-misalignment evaluation that ends with the "Alignments" header empty.

Through-line

Yahir is evaluating Emily as the lynchpin candidate while explicitly cataloging value/worldview gaps. The arc sits structurally identical to the Sam arc and the Jo arc — relationship-as-evaluation-process — but with longer duration and higher stakes (the "Big Life" bar from 2023 12 29 vision for big life).

Chronological

  • ~2025 mid — first vague mention in IRL Lore Tab 5 (the party-kiss "fever dream esque" scene with Emily Stevens by name).
  • 2025-10-28 — the explicit intimate wishlist, Emily named.
  • 2025-11-07 — 5 day Austin visit itinerary curated for Emily.
  • 2025-11-13 — 2 AM 23rd birthday voicemail from Texan West Campus (peak-arc capture); paired false start 2025 11 13 texan west campus.
  • 2026-01-29 — Spanish vocab list for "Billy" (likely Emily-orbit family member).
  • 2026-02-03 — Yahir helping with Emily's Spanish assignment.
  • 2026-02-26 — Helping with Emily's FHS 492 food insecurity issue brief AND Yahir writes the "fall backwards" identity manifesto same day.
  • 2026-03-06 — March visit.
  • 2026-03-24 — Misalignment list — Yahir cataloging gaps; Alignments header empty.
  • 2026-04-27 — E 51st St voice memo narrates the relationship's unraveling in real time; Emily still in his orbit per 2026 04 27 rankett com build doc.

Key inflection points

  • Naming her in the wishlist (Oct 28) — the relationship is real enough to be written down.
  • Helping with schoolwork (Feb 3 + Feb 26) — investment-as-care.
  • The misalignment list with empty Alignments (March 24) — evaluation tipping toward exit.

Open questions

  • Did the relationship persist past April 2026?
  • Did Yahir ever populate the Alignments side of the list?
  • Was Eugene-vs-Austin distance the unspoken backdrop?

Related

  • 2025 10 28 exactly what i want emily
  • 2025 11 07 when bros and emily come
  • 2026 02 26 issue brief emily stevens
  • 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment
  • lynchpin life companion
  • 2023 12 29 vision for big life — the Big Life bar
  • post breakup conflict — pattern likely to be invoked
